mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: neurological symptoms (coma, confusion, language impairment, shuffling gait, oromotor apraxia), hepatomegaly (heptic steatosis)
seizure disorders (possible cause of coma and confusion), hypertension, cholecystitis, renal anomaly (multiple glomerular cysts), skin abnormalities (not mentioned but common feature)

hypohydrosis (may present as excessive drooling due to decreased sweating), angiokeratomas (small red spots on the skin, not mentioned but typical), proteinuria (possibly related to multiple glomerular cysts), cardiac involvement (hypertension, arrhythmias), corneal opacity (anterior uveitis), gastrointestinal issues (chronic gastritis, pancreatic fistula)
cognitive decline (confusion, language impairment, perseverative thoughts), psychiatric features (depression, irritability), movement disorder (shuffling gait, tip-toe gait), weight loss

mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.disease_name: Neurodevelopmental disorder with epilepsy and hemochromatosis
mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: liver damage (hectic steatosis, cirrhosis), joint pain (recurrent fractures), arthritis, increased serum iron levels, pituitary insufficiency
cafe au lait macules (skin pigmentation), neurofibromas (benign tumors under the skin), freckles in axillary region, short stature, scoliosis
skeletal dysplasia with short limbs, small hands, kyphoscoliosis, hearing loss, respiratory problems
diabetes mellitus type I, optic nerve atrophy (blurred vision), deafness, urinary tract malformations
demyelination leading to motor deficiencies (gait disturbances, spasticity), mental retardation, visual problems
muscle weakness, enlarged heart, respiratory distress, feeding difficulties
